problem id: 26a70ae0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(3)) AND ROT(1)

examples:
  11101000 -> 00010001
  00101000 -> 00000000
  01110011 -> 11000110
  01111010 -> 10000100
  11011101 -> 00011011
  11010011 -> 10000010
  01110101 -> 01001010
  10011001 -> 00010011
  11001100 -> 00011001
  01100001 -> 01000000

query: 11101010
predicted answer: 10010101
